description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a casual, short-sleeved, button-up shirt with a checkered pattern, paired with straight-cut pants and athletic-style shoes. The shirt fits loosely around the torso, and the pants are slightly tapered at the ankles. His facial features are neutral, and he has a short, neatly trimmed hairstyle. The figure's hands are open and fingers extended, and the shoes appear to be comfortable for walking. The overall appearance suggests a typical urban pedestrian, ready for everyday activities.
description: A stocky adult male in a checkered button-up shirt, straight pants, and athletic shoes, standing upright with arms outstretched. He has a short, neat hairstyle and a casual urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and the checkered shirt with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the shirt's loose fit, and the straight leg of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the shirt's checkered pattern, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the relaxed fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved button-up shirt and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
